name: Amazon Business Prime American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $125 Amazon.com gift card upon approval.

earning_rates.notes: 5% back or 5 points per $1 on the first $120,000 in purchases per calendar year; then 1% or 1 point per $1

earning_rates.category: Restaurants, Gas Stations, Office Supply Stores
earning_rates.notes: 3% back at U.S. restaurants, U.S. gas stations, and U.S. office supply stores
1% back on all other eligible purchases

other_benefits: Amazon Prime Business membership is required (included with Amazon Business Prime subscription)
Flexible payment options: choose between paying over time or paying in full
